data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Gain On Reduced Uncertainty, Gold Holds Near Highs - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets end higher on Monday boosted by Apple, while concerns over pending tariffs and trade uncertainty cap gains. Most S&P 500 sectors rise.

data.title: US Stock Futures Waver After Two-Day Rally: Trump's Tariff Moves Could End A 3-Year 'Rolling Recession,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Tuesday following a two-day advance. Futures of major benchmark indices were mixed in premarket.

data.title: Eric Trump Celebrates Metaplanet's Bitcoin Moonshot As 'Asia's Strategy' Rockets Into Top 10 Corporate Holders With $388 Million BTC Stash
data.description: Eric Trump, strategic advisor to Japan-based Metaplanet Inc. (OTC:MTPLF), cheered the firm’s jump in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings over the last year.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg Proposed 'Wiping' All Friends Connections And Make Users 'Start Again' To Keep Facebook 'Culturally Relevant,' Antitrust Trial Reveals
data.description: In a landmark antitrust trial, Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) CEO, Mark Zuckerberg, took the stand on Monday. During his testimony, Zuckerberg disclosed a previously unimplemented plan to reset all Facebook users' connections in 2022.

data.title: Why Ericsson Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 7%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
